event.rest.text: You set up camp inside a narrow cavern, the chill of the stone walls offering little comfort. Fatigue wraps around you like a heavy cloak, and before long, sleep takes hold.
event.shop.text: An older man shuffles toward you, his cart groaning with age and rust. 'Take a look at my wares... will you?' he rasps, eyes glinting beneath his hood.
event.weepingstatue.text: A solemn statue looms atop a crumbling pedestal, silent tears of blood streaking its stone face. It compels you to take it... Will you?
event.masks.text: Two ornate masks rest atop a stone slab—one carved in joy, the other twisted in sorrow. A whisper slithers into your thoughts: 'Choose a face to wear... but know the mask may wear you.'
